articles.title: Wimbledon 2026: Serena Williams and Venus Williams receive doubles wildcard - BBC
articles.description: Serena Williams is given a wildcard to play alongside older sister Venus in the Wimbledon women's doubles.

articles.title: BASE jumping accident kills 2 including extreme athlete Andy Lewis, who performed with Madonna at Super Bowl - CBS News
articles.description: A BASE jumping accident in a Utah canyon killed two people including a daredevil athlete best known for performing onstage with Madonna at the 2012 Super Bowl, authorities said.

articles.title: World Cup official says twitch caused gesture resembling supremacist sign; FIFA says no breach - NBC News
articles.description: A World Cup video review official said his hand gesture resembling a white supremacist sign was caused by an involuntary twitch, and a FIFA committee concluded the Australian didn’t breach the sport’s disciplinary code

articles.title: Iran Team Forced To Leave U.S. Immediately After World Cup Draw Amid Protests Against Tehran - Deadline
articles.description: The Iranian football team were forced to leave the U.S. immediately after their 2-2 World Cup group stage draw with New Zealand.

articles.title: 40-year-old Cape Verde goalkeeper keeps favorite Spain to 0 goals at World Cup - NPR
articles.description: Vozinha recorded seven saves Monday, holding Spain's star-studded lineup to a shocking 0-0 draw. The veteran keeper was everywhere as the Spanish team and its fans became increasingly frustrated.

articles.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong Hits for Cycle, Highlights and Stats for Cubs Star vs. Rockies - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit for the cycle in reverse order Monday.

articles.title: MLB decries use of personal writings on Pride Night hats - ESPN
articles.description: Major League Baseball on Monday decried the use of personal writings on any team-issued Pride Night hats after members of the San Francisco Giants had Bible verses etched into their caps during Friday's loss to the Chicago Cubs.

articles.title: Texas Tech will not attempt to recover NIL money paid to Brendan Sorsby - NBC Sports
articles.description: Cody Campbell issues long statement regarding Sorsby's exit from Texas Tech.

articles.title: Iran, New Zealand play to 2-2 draw to keep Group G tied up with 1 point apiece - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Group G is all tied up in the standings after Belgium and Egypt played to a draw earlier Monday.

articles.title: Knicks raise Jimmy Fallon’s lucky shoe to the ‘Tonight Show’ rafters as championship celebration rolls on - New York Post
articles.description: Before the Knicks raise their championship banner at the Garden, a different one was erected on “The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon.”

articles.title: Brendan Sorsby Will Reportedly Enter NFL Supplemental Draft - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Despite a judge restoring his collegiate eligibility with a temporary injunction after he was declared ineligible for gambling, Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby is reportedly headed to the NFL.

articles.title: Showing up for mandatory minicamp was the only move for George Pickens - NBC Sports
articles.description: George Pickens basically made his decision to attend the Cowboys' mandatory minicamp when he made the decision to accept the one-year franchise tender.

articles.title: Justin Thomas on practice-round wait times at Shinnecock: ‘It’s gotten terrible’ - Golf Channel
articles.description: The U.S. Open brought big wind and not nearly as much activity for a Monday, typical these days of practice rounds at majors that move to a different course each year.

articles.title: Matt Jones goes 1-on-1 with J Batt, Kentucky's new AD - On3
articles.description: Matt Jones goes one-on-one with J Batt, Kentucky's new CEO of Champions Blue and Athletic Director.

articles.title: Zuckerberg, more tech moguls celebrate Trump birthday at White House UFC match - SFGATE
articles.description: Mark Zuckerberg and other tech industry giants joined the president to celebrate his 80th birthday with a UFC match at the White House.

articles.title: 2026 NASCAR Cup Series entry list for Naval Base Coronado - NASCAR.com
articles.description: Check out the Cup Series entry list for Naval Base Coronado, with the 3.4-mile street circuit scheduled for Sunday (4 p.m. ET, Prime Video).

articles.title: Hamilton's real Barcelona pace advantage explained - The Race
articles.description: How big a role did the VSC really play in Lewis Hamilton's Barcelona victory? Jon Noble crunches the numbers

articles.title: Shohei Ohtani, Aaron Judge Among Top Vote-Getters in 1st 2026 MLB All-Star Game Ballot Update - Bleacher Report
articles.description: MLB released the first batch of voting returns for the 2026 MLB All-Star Game on Monday, and a somewhat surprising candidate leads the balloting in the American League.

articles.title: Josh Hokit disparages Michelle Obama at UFC White House event - ESPN
articles.description: UFC fighter Josh Hokit targeted Michelle Obama during his postfight comments at Sunday's UFC White House event, saying the former First Lady "is a man."

articles.title: Three Up, Three Down: Drivers in focus leaving Pocono - NASCAR.com
articles.description: NASCAR Cup Series drivers come into focus after a weekend of racing at Pocono, with three on the upswing and three more on the downturn.
